subject: COAS Web Brief - Jun 16, 2026
paragraph: Visitor traffic to the College of Arts and Sciences web presence reached 690,600 sessions over the past 7 days, led by Mathematics, which alone drew 78,466 sessions and signals strong external interest in the department's programs and faculty research. Engagement, however, tells a more complicated story ? with only 37% of visitors meaningfully interacting with content and an average session lasting just over three minutes, a significant share of that audience is leaving before connecting with what the College has to offer.
priorities:
• Hoping to hear back from Jeremey, if not I'm going to look into setting up the environment in WPE to start moving CHEM over to research.artsci.tamu.edu/chemistry/[site]
  • I will be posting about my student worker today but I have a question for you, sending asap.
  • Waiting to hear back about phones
  • Finalizing governance documents for you to review once I get back. I have web content governance, roles and responsibilities and new user creation and management.
note: Let me know if you want to do the web task force meeting early this week or wait till July.
